title: Commission adopts €1.5 billion work programme to boost European and Ukrainian defence industry
headline: Commission adopts €1.5 billion work programme to boost European and Ukrainian defence industry
deck: European Commission Press release Brussels, 30 Mar 2026 The European Commission approved today a €1.5 billion work programme under the European Defence Industry Programme (EDIP).
